# Approved Action Guidance

Source of truth:
- `docs/monorepo-docs/ci.md`
- Section: `CI Security` → `Usage of Third Party GitHub Actions`

Quick examples often used in this monorepo:
- `actions/*@*`
- `camunda/*@*`
- `docker/*@*`
- `hashicorp/vault-action@*`
- `dorny/paths-filter@*`
- `nick-fields/retry@*`
- `slackapi/slack-github-action@*`

Always verify against the latest documentation before merging.
